name: Grilled Tempeh with Red Onion & Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 2 large garlic cloves, sliced into ovals
1 large red onion, sliced into 6 rounds
2 small eggplants, sliced into 1/3-inch thick rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade by combining all ingredients and mixing.
2. Slice the tempeh cakes in half crosswise, then split each half horizontally by slicing carefully.
3. Marinate the tempeh in the red wine marinade for 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Brush eggplant slices with olive oil.
5. Grill eggplant and onion slices over medium-hot coals for 10 minutes per side.
6. Grill bread slices over low coals until they are toasty.
7. Arrange vegetables and tempeh on the toasted bread, garnished with arugula.
